intent: In DATA_DIR there is a 10x matrix triplet for one PBMC sample — files prefixed GSM5746268_MGI0369_1_SLAB-C1-C1 (matrix.mtx.gz, barcodes.tsv.gz, features.tsv.gz). Using scanpy, do standard QC, normalization, highly-variable genes, PCA, neighbors, Leiden clustering and a UMAP, then identify marker genes per cluster and show me a UMAP and a marker dotplot.

blocks.text: Good, the GSM5746268 sample files are there. Now let me load this data and run the standard QC and clustering pipeline using scanpy.

input.code:
import scanpy as sc
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import seaborn as sns
from pathlib import Path
import os

# Set DATA_DIR and WORK_DIR
DATA_DIR = '/tmp/aba_eval/arm_control/data'
WORK_DIR = os.getcwd()

# Set scanpy settings
sc.settings.verbosity = 3
sc.settings.set_figure_params(dpi=150, figsize=(6, 6))

# Load the 10x matrix triplet for GSM5746268
prefix = 'GSM5746268_MGI0369_1_SLAB-C1-C1'
adata = sc.read_10x_mtx(
    DATA_DIR,
    prefix=prefix,
    first_element_names=True,
    gex_only=True
)

print("Loaded AnnData object:")
print(adata)
print("\nGene names (first 10):", adata.var_names[:10].tolist())
print("Barcode count:", adata.n_obs)
print("Gene count:", adata.n_vars)
print("Matrix sparsity:", 1 - (adata.X.nnz / (adata.n_obs * adata.n_vars)))
